Estimating spawning salmon abundance from visual surveys: a hierarchical model of arrival and exit dynamics

Patrick L. Thompson, Scott A. Akenhead, Colette Louie

This repository contains the files needed to produce this manuscript. The full reproducible analysis, including running the Stan models and producing the pdf, is all done in the /markdown/multilevel_spawners.Rmd file. Note the raw survey data used in this study are the property of the Okanagan Nation Alliance. Please contact them directly concerning availability and acknowledgements: [Sylix.org](sylix.org).
